---
title: "flixpatrol_options"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `flixpatrol_options()`

FlixPatrol Package Options

## Usage

```r
flixpatrol_options()
```

## Value

A tibble of available options (invisibly). Prints a formatted list.

## Description

Lists all available package options, their descriptions, and current values.

## Details

Set options using 'options(flixpatrol.option_name = value)'.
Add to your '~/.Rprofile' to make permanent.

## Examples

```r
flixpatrol_options()

# Set an option
options(flixpatrol.silent = TRUE)
```
